reasoning_model_1: The model was tasked with saying '周末你有什么计划吗？' in a normal volume. The generated audio is fully compliant. Content accuracy is perfect, with the entire sentence spoken correctly. Fluency and naturalness are excellent, sounding like a natural human question. Regarding the core requirement, the volume throughout the entire duration (approx. 0.0s - 2.0s) is consistently at a normal, conversational level. It is not too loud or too quiet, perfectly matching the '正常音量' command.
reasoning_model_2: The model was asked to generate '周末你有什么计划吗？' at a normal volume. The output is flawless. The content is an exact match to the script. The speech is very fluent and natural, with appropriate prosody for a question. The core paralinguistic feature, '正常音量' (normal volume), is accurately rendered. The volume level from the start to the end of the utterance (approx. 0.0s - 2.2s) is stable and fits the description of a normal conversational tone.
model_comparison: Both models performed exceptionally well and are considered a tie. Both T1 and T2 perfectly matched the text content and exhibited high levels of fluency and naturalness. The core evaluation criterion was the adherence to '正常音量' (normal volume). Both audios successfully produced a voice at a standard, conversational volume level, without being too loud or too soft. There are no discernible differences in their ability to control for this specific feature; any variations are related to speaker timbre, which is not a factor in this evaluation. Therefore, the performance is identical.
